codeReview.summary: The fix correctly removes same-millisecond flakiness by replacing strict timestamp inequality with a millisecond-safe comparison while still asserting core behavior (selection persistence). The added pre-update assertion improves test clarity and intent.

summary: Reviewed handoff, commit diff, transcript skeleton, and skill/procedure context for feature stabilize-workspace-store-timestamp-test. Implementation is scoped, deterministic, and aligned with expected behavior; no blocking or non-blocking issues found.
